title: Lemonade Inc (LMND) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Cash Flow and Strategic Growth Plans
text: Lemonade achieved significant milestones in Q3 2024, with enforced premiums reaching $889 million, representing a 24% year-over-year increase. The company generated its strongest cash flow quarter to date, with net cash flow rising by $48 million and positive free cash flow of $14 million. The insurer ended the quarter with $979 million in cash and investments. Gross profit grew 71% year-over-year to $37 million, while the gross loss ratio improved to 73%, marking its strongest result in four years. Customer growth accelerated with a 17% increase to 2.3 million policyholders, while premium per customer climbed 6% to $384. Annual dollar retention reached 87%, up 2 percentage points from the prior year. Revenue increased 19% to $137 million, with gross earned premium climbing 23% to $213 million. The company improved IFP per employee for the 11th consecutive quarter, demonstrating operational efficiency gains. Despite achievements, the company reported a net loss of $68 million ($0.95 per share). Operating expenses increased 27% year-over-year to $125 million, primarily driven by a $27 million surge in sales and marketing spending focused on growth acquisition. Headcount declined approximately 7% to 1,216 employees, while adjusted EBITDA loss reached $49 million. Management expects to achieve net cash flow consistently positive from here on out, with operating cash flow turning wholly positive by year-end 2025. The company plans expanding auto insurance to additional states in 2025.
